falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes below 4,800 on any single day within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A break below the August 2024 lows invalidates the bottom_2024_aug pattern match, as that floor was never breached in the original pattern; this would signal structural weakness rather than a bottoming formation

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained extreme fear levels contradict the bottoming pattern which featured VIX peaking and rapidly declining; this would indicate capitulation is still ongoing rather than completed

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield drops below 3.50% while S&P 500 simultaneously falls more than 2% in the same session
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A flight-to-safety bid in bonds during an equity selloff signals recession panic rather than the growth-scare-bottom dynamic of August 2024; this breaks the correlation structure that defined the original pattern

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
